     Sources: src/demos/, src/content/components/, src/data/features.ts -->

# Dropdown Menu

Top-layer rendering, Esc + click-outside dismiss, anchored under the trigger, auto-flips at viewport edges. All attributes and CSS.

```html
<button
  type="button"
  popovertarget="dd-options"
  class="inline-flex h-9 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-input bg-transparent px-4 text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap text-foreground transition-colors hover:bg-accent focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-ring [anchor-name:--dd-options]"
>
  Options
  <svg class="size-3.5 text-muted-foreground" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"></path>
  </svg>
</button>

<div
  id="dd-options"
  popover
  class="m-auto min-w-44 scale-95 rounded-lg border border-border bg-popover p-1 text-popover-foreground opacity-0 shadow-lg transition-[opacity,scale,overlay,display] transition-discrete duration-150 open:scale-100 open:opacity-100 starting:open:scale-95 starting:open:opacity-0 [position-anchor:--dd-options] [position-area:block-end_span-inline-end] [position-try-fallbacks:flip-block] supports-[anchor-name:--a]:m-0 supports-[anchor-name:--a]:mt-1.5 supports-[anchor-name:--a]:origin-top-left"
>
  <button type="button" class="flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent focus-visible:bg-accent focus-visible:outline-none">Edit</button>
  <button type="button" class="flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent focus-visible:bg-accent focus-visible:outline-none">Duplicate</button>
  <button type="button" class="flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent focus-visible:bg-accent focus-visible:outline-none">Share…</button>
  <hr class="-mx-1 my-1 border-border" />
  <button type="button" class="flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left text-sm text-destructive hover:bg-accent focus-visible:bg-accent focus-visible:outline-none">Delete</button>
</div>
```

## How it works

- The `popover` attribute + `popovertarget` on the button gives top-layer rendering, toggling,
  Esc and click-outside dismiss.
- CSS anchor positioning pins the panel under the trigger: `[anchor-name:--dd-options]` on the
  button, then `[position-anchor:--dd-options]` + `[position-area:block-end_span-inline-end]`
  on the panel ("below the anchor, growing to the right").
- `[position-try-fallbacks:flip-block]` flips the panel above the trigger near the bottom of the
  viewport.
- `position-area` is unknown to browsers without anchor support, so they ignore it and the menu
  opens centered instead (the top-layer default). That's why the base classes keep `m-auto`. Only
  the margin reset (`m-0` plus the `mt-1.5` gap) and the transform origin need explicit
  `supports-[anchor-name:--a]:` guards.
- One trap this dodges: resetting placement with the `inset` **shorthand** under a variant can
  land later in the stylesheet than your `top`/`left` longhands and silently wipe them.
  `position-area` doesn't touch insets at all.

## Accessibility

Focus moves into the menu with Tab; Esc returns to the trigger. This is a popover, not an ARIA
menu. There's no roving arrow-key navigation. For most "actions under a button" cases that's
fine; if you need full menu semantics, that genuinely still needs JavaScript.

## Leading-edge features used (and what happens without them)

- **Popover API** ([MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Popover_API))
  Without it: Content renders in normal document flow, always visible, and the trigger does nothing.
- **CSS anchor positioning** ([MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_anchor_positioning))
  Without it: The popover opens centered in the viewport (the top-layer default) instead of attached to its trigger.
- **Entry/exit animations (allow-discrete + @starting-style)** ([MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/transition-behavior))
  Without it: Elements appear and disappear instantly. Nothing breaks — you just lose the animation.
